title: Thingamabobs
description: Add way too many tools to your game!
body:
Thingamabobs

Add way too many tools to your game!

Includes the following tools: - Fork and spoon: Place in offhand to eat food items in bites. - Tongs: Pick up and throw dropped items. - Rake: Move leaf litter around, one block at a time. - Egg timer: Rings after 1 minute. - Swedish Army Knife: Sneak and use to switch out the active tool. - Jackhammer: Digs straight down when activated. - Nutcracker: Crafts a single item at a time. - Tiered tools which can be made out of any item!
